title: Anticlea hintoniorum
taxonomy: Anticlea hintoniorum is classified as a species within the genus Anticlea and the family Melanthiaceae. This genus is part of the larger order Liliales. Anticlea hintoniorum is native to Mexico, which is consistent with its classification as a species endemic to this region. The classification of Anticlea hintoniorum places it within the family of true lilies. The specific classification allows for a clear understanding of the plant's evolutionary history and relationships with other species.
